info.description: Generated baseline for Holon's current HTTP control-plane surface. It is intentionally conservative: many response bodies remain JSON placeholders until the success/error envelope contracts stabilize.
info.title: Holon HTTP control-plane API

get.description: Return the default agent id.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return lightweight public agent entries.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return a bounded page of projected runtime events. Query parameters: before_seq, after_seq, limit, order, projection.

200.description: Successful JSON response. Baseline schema is intentionally loose until per-route response DTO contracts are stabilized.

get.description: Return Server-Sent Events carrying StreamEventEnvelope JSON data. Query parameters: after_seq, limit, projection.

200.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Each data frame contains a StreamEventEnvelope JSON object.
